Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7044 0 0}...I'm starting to get it now. This sure is helpful![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}I've never thought much about why you'd do certain exercises or regimens... or anything like that, really.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}You should. It's important to know where your muscles are located and how they work together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7040 0 0}Thanks for demonstrating, Aigis! That made everything so much easier to understand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3066 0 0}Anything else you're curious about? I'm all ears, ask away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}Well... Yeah, kind of. But it's fine, really! It's not a big deal or anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}Don't be afraid to ask questions. If there's anything you want to know, let's hear it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7062 0 0}It's... It's about what the book said at the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}The "never give up no matter what" and "press forward in the face of failure" bit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Isn't that more about developing mental fortitude than actual strength? Failing means not getting results, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}Hm... Yeah, you've got a good point there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}However, regular training improves more than just your physical strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Aigis, do you know what I'm getting at?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3036 0 0}I mean, you're not wrong, but... That might be a bit hard for Amada to understand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You're close, though. I'm talking about that feeling you get when you conquer a milestone, that boost in confidence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3108 0 0}Heh. Exactly. Specifically the confidence you gain after conquering a milestone in your training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3089 0 0}I was just saying there's more to it than that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}After conquering a milestone in your training, you gain more confidence in yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}And that confidence you build will see you through any future hardship yet to come.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You'll believe that you can pull through, that there's nothing you can lose to after everything you've endured.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}Wow... You really think so?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3074 0 0}The real battle takes place before you even get in the ring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}If you want to make progress, then you've got to commit to training—every day, nonstop, no shortcuts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Sometimes I forget that myself, but it's important to bring it back to the forefront and stick to your routine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying his piece to[n]Amada-san, Sanada-san seems[n]to be deep in thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3115 0 0}Of course, that alone isn't enough to secure victory. You also need to figure out a regimen best suited for your goals.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}Got it! Thank you for helping me out, Sanada-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}Actually... You helped me reignite my passion for this sort of thing, Amada. I should be the one thanking you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3054 0 0}Looks like I took up more of your time than expected.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}At least Amada got something out of it. Thanks for lending us a hand.[n]{f 1 1}
